items.example: I wake up at 6 o'clock every morning.
She gets up early to exercise.
He brushes his teeth after every meal.
I shower before going to work.
My mother has breakfast at 7 a.m.
My father goes to work by motorbike.
School starts at 7:30 every day.
She finishes work at 5 p.m.
My grandmother cooks dinner for the family.
We eat lunch together at noon.
He drinks a glass of water every morning.
She studies English for two hours each day.
They watch the news before bed.
He reads a book every night.
I exercise at the gym three times a week.
She walks to school every day.
He takes the bus to the office.
She arrives at school at 7:45.
My brother leaves home at 6:30.
I sleep eight hours every night.
She goes to bed at 10 p.m.
I usually have rice for lunch.
He always arrives on time.
She sometimes skips breakfast.
They never eat fast food.
